summary: Plan-only classification for cluster gitcrawl-40-bulk-plan-20260615-a. #92062 remains the live canonical issue. Security-signaled refs are routed non-mutatingly; unrelated reset/session-history work is kept related or independent, with no close, merge, or fix PR actions planned.
